<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:r:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:r:typA::resA]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::provA]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 2 created<{%reset%}>
